_comment: Hand-labeled inputs → expected project id. EDIT the expected values to match how you'd actually file these; they're seeded guesses. Run with `npm run eval`.

cases.input: validate rs485 loopback on the saman board
run a BIST sweep on the dock unit and log ECC status
capture the MCM register dump during self-test
check I2C3 bus enumeration on PSS/SAMAN
bring up the m7 board resetter firmware on the bench
verify reset pulse timing with the scope before flashing rev B
debug remoteproc hang during M7 firmware boot
align DTS carveouts with the TCM regions for the m7
wire the ollama agent to auto-link new vault notes
benchmark local models for the note-classification agent
add a reranker to the local RAG pipeline
book the dentist appointment for next week
renew the apartment lease before it expires
pick up groceries on the way home
email liz the bank verification letter for payroll
